creator: rnordier@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->closed

The originator has confirmed that the problem is due to using an XT/AT 
(unextended) keyboard.  Following various off-list discussions, it has 
been decided that the boot2 -P logic will remain "as is" for now.  The 
boot(8) man page has been updated to warn that "unextended" keyboards 
are not detected by the probe.
